prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 49–55 名（2026 年第 55 名），排名稳定，属全国农林类头部高校；2023 年声誉评价中性/混合（图书馆表白墙事件），2026 年声誉数据中无该校负面记录；抖音热度排名第 102/106，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量偏低，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；作物学 A+、植物保护 A+、食品科学与工程 A、兽医学 A-、畜牧学 A-，共 5 个 A- 及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，该校相关专业（人工智能、电子信息类、机械类等）受益于整体工科热度；本省物理类考生 2021 年 14.7 万→2025 年 25.0 万，持续增长，2026 年估算约 25.1 万，竞争基数进一步扩大；省控线（本科批）2021–2025 年波动于 397–437 分之间，2025 年为 426 分，整体平稳；南京农业大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对湖北省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在湖北招生占比约 2%–3%，非主要生源省份，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年物理类计划扩招约 19.8%（竞争加剧）、本省物理类考生基数持续扩大（约 25.1 万）以及学校层次稳定、声誉中性等因素，在 2025 年基准 22070 名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 24591 名，区间 24091–25091 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19317→19208→20672→21997→22070, showing a gradual backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2800 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 22070; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 82 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 89 in 2024, and 96 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan increases to 115, an expansion of about 19.8% compared to 2025, significantly increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has been around 49–55 in recent years (55th in 2026), stable, belonging to the top agricultural and forestry universities nationwide; the 2023 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident), and the 2026 reputation data shows no negative records for this school; Douyin heat ranking is 102/106, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms, no obvious abnormal signals in application heat; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Husbandry A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended in social heat; the school's related majors (Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, etc.) benefit from the overall engineering heat; the number of provincial Physics Category examinees increased from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with continuous growth, estimated at about 251,000 in 2026, further expanding the competition base; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) fluctuated between 397–437 points from 2021 to 2025, with 426 points in 2025, overall stable; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei examinees; the school's enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 2%–3%, not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 19.8% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (intensified competition), the continuous increase in the provincial Physics Category examinee base (about 251,000), and the stable school level and neutral reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 22070, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 24591, with a range of 24091–25091.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3877→4107→4236→4503→4516, showing a gradual slight backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 280 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4516; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 10 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 16 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan increases to 23, an expansion of about 43.8% compared to 2025, a very large expansion, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking in recent years around 49–55 (55th in 2026), stable ranking, belonging to the top agricultural and forestry universities nationwide; 2023 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident), no negative records of this school in 2026 reputation data; Douyin heat ranking 102/106, evaluation as "average", no obvious abnormal application heat signal; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics; History Category enrollment majors mainly in economics, management, literature, and law, with low correlation to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social heat differentiation wait-and-see, Finance/Economics/Economy differentiation wait-and-see, English average wait-and-see, overall liberal arts major heat stable; provincial History Category examinees 149,000 in 2021→141,000 in 2025, slight fluctuation, estimated about 143,000 in 2026, basically flat; provincial control line (undergraduate batch) fluctuated between 426–463 points from 2021 to 2025, 442 points in 2025, overall stable; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei examinees; the school's enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 2%–3%, not a major source province, limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the historical slight backward trend in rankings, the significant expansion of about 43.8% in the History Category plan for 2026 (competition significantly eased), the basically stable number of provincial History Category examinees, and the stable school level and neutral reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 4516, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward; predicted minimum ranking about 5651, range 5151–6151.
